title: DirectMS1 Ultrafast proteomics: Protein extraction & digestion
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"962mq","text":"Ultrafast proteomic workflows, employing liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry, demand equally rapid sample preparation. To overcome the bottleneck of overnight protein digestion, this study optimized reduction, alkylation, and trypsin digestion using ultrasound, microwave irradiation, and elevated temperatures, achieving completion within 30-60 minutes. Validation using various sample types (S. cerevisiae, A549 cells, winter wheat) and human-yeast quantitation standards confirmed the reproducibility of label-free quantification. The microwave-assisted method, reducing preparation time 35-fold, showed high reproducibility in protein quantitation, demonstrating the potential for high-throughput analysis in clinical proteomics.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"6uaqr","text":"For troubleshooting help, feel free to message to the corresponding author iatarasova@gmail.com.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dqaik","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"epdno","text":"Avoid salts and non-volatile buffers in your final purification steps, if possible. In most cases,dry your sample down in a speed-vac and re-suspend it in 50mM ammonium bicarbonate pH 8.3 for a tryptic digestion.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2mbjv","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bgoic","text":"The list of reagents can be found in the 'Materials' section","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"49r6b","text":"To ensure safety, reactions with chloroform, methanol and trifluoroacetic acid must be carried out in a fume hood. The experimenter must be protected with gloves throughout the experiment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Sample 1*10 9 yeast cells.
